author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Latios and the Soul Dew Coming Soon! | Pokémon Sleep
The Latios and the Soul Dew event is coming to Pokémon Sleep in early June 2026!

During this event, the Legendary Pokémon Latios will be appearing—and it will be crucial to work with researchers around the world to accumulate Drowsy Power! You have a chance to meet Latias during the event, too!

More details about the Legendary Pokémon Latios and other events will be available in next week’s news. We hope you’re looking forward to it!

Check here for more details: https://www.pokemonsleep.net/devices/

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/
Official Site: https://www.pokemon.com
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/pokemon
